center.name: 乍得湖
center.summary: 乍得湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括River prinia、Dorst's cisticola，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in West Africa and south of Lake Chad

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northwestern Senegal, along the Niger River (near the border between Mali and Niger), in the Lake Chad region and in northwestern Kenya
